content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the car positioned on the left side of the track, and the orange dashed center line is visible curving away to the left — the car appears to be on course following the left bend.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 50, target = (50 + 5) % 121 = 55
- Target WP55: (4.4711, 2.9590)
- Car: x=5.2532, y=2.5723, heading=-177.80°
- dy = 2.9590 - 2.5723 = 0.3867
- dx = 4.4711 - 5.2532 = -0.7821
- bearing = atan2(0.3867, -0.7821) = 180° - atan2(0.3867, 0.7821) = 180° - 26.35° = 153.65°
- delta = 153.65° - (-177.80°) = 331.45° → normalize: 331.45 - 360 = -28.55°
- |delta| ≈ 29° → moderate right correction, steering_angle=-15°

```json

  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead but WP55 is still to the right of current heading (delta=-28.55°), continuing moderate right steering at speed 1.5 to align with the waypoint line.",

    "Track heads west around WP46-52, then curves left (southwest) toward WP55+",
    "Car is consistently ~0.19m left of center on westward section — stable position",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta around -27 to -29° on this westward section requires steering_angle=-15",
    "After WP55-58, track curves sharply left heading southwest — prepare to steer left",
    "Heading wraps near ±180° when traveling west — normalize delta carefully",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "WP55+ marks increasing left curve heading southwest, left steering needed soon",
    "Car has been consistently right-correcting on westward section — pattern is stable",
    "Watch for delta sign flip when track turns left past WP56-58"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.567, 5.453, 5.354, 5.253],
    "y": [2.571, 2.564, 2.565, 2.572],

  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP55 at (4.471, 2.959): dy=0.387, dx=-0.782, bearing=153.65°, delta=-28.55° → moderate right, steer -15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
